prose: The frontier-orbital energies of ethylene were computed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (PySCF), tier `standard`, in the gas phase. SCF convergence was achieved after 6 cycles. The HOMO energy was found to be -7.6156 eV, and the LUMO energy was -0.17987 eV. The computed HOMO–LUMO gap is **7.4357 eV**. This geometry consists of 6 atoms, and the calculation was performed on the input XYZ file located at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz`. No warnings were reported, and integrity checks found the result trustworthy.
